journeys.name: Unauthenticated Redirect And Click Tracking

journeys.name: New User Creates Short URL And Views Dashboard
journeys.description: A new user registers, creates their first short URL, and views their dashboard to see it listed with initial stats

journeys.name: New User Creates Custom Short Code
journeys.description: A new user registers and creates a short URL with a custom vanity code, then verifies the custom code works

journeys.name: Returning User Checks Click Stats After Visits
journeys.description: A returning user logs in, views stats for a previously created URL, and confirms click counts have incremented after visits

journeys.name: New User Generates QR Code For Short URL
journeys.description: A user creates a short URL and generates a QR code for it, verifying the QR code endpoint returns image data

journeys.name: Returning User Full CRUD On Short URLs
journeys.description: A returning user logs in, creates a URL, updates its destination, verifies the change, then deletes it

journeys.name: State Persistence Across Sessions
journeys.description: A user creates short URLs, logs out, logs back in, and confirms all URLs and stats persist across sessions

journeys.name: Admin Views All Users And URLs
journeys.description: An admin logs in and views system-wide stats, all users, and all URLs across the platform

journeys.name: Duplicate Custom Code Rejected
journeys.description: A user tries to create a short URL with a custom code that's already taken and receives an error

journeys.name: Invalid Short Code Returns 404
journeys.description: A visitor tries to access a short code that doesn't exist and gets a proper 404 error

tier2_result.intent: URL shortener with user auth, create short URLs, redirect, click tracking, dashboard with stats, custom short codes, QR codes

journeys.name: Unauthenticated Redirect And Click Tracking
journeys.description: A visitor clicks a short URL and gets redirected to the original destination, contributing to click tracking stats

journeys.name: New User Creates Short URL And Views Dashboard
journeys.description: A new user registers, creates their first short URL, and views their dashboard to see it listed with initial stats

journeys.name: New User Creates Custom Short Code
journeys.description: A new user registers and creates a short URL with a custom vanity code, then verifies the custom code works

journeys.name: Returning User Checks Click Stats After Visits
journeys.description: A returning user logs in, views stats for a previously created URL, and confirms click counts have incremented after visits

journeys.name: New User Generates QR Code For Short URL
journeys.description: A user creates a short URL and generates a QR code for it, verifying the QR code endpoint returns image data

journeys.name: Returning User Full CRUD On Short URLs
journeys.description: A returning user logs in, creates a URL, updates its destination, verifies the change, then deletes it

journeys.name: State Persistence Across Sessions
journeys.description: A user creates short URLs, logs out, logs back in, and confirms all URLs and stats persist across sessions

journeys.name: Admin Views All Users And URLs
journeys.description: An admin logs in and views system-wide stats, all users, and all URLs across the platform

journeys.name: Duplicate Custom Code Rejected
journeys.description: A user tries to create a short URL with a custom code that's already taken and receives an error

journeys.name: Invalid Short Code Returns 404
journeys.description: A visitor tries to access a short code that doesn't exist and gets a proper 404 error
